title: ひと華咲かせてみせやしょう

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Huh? I've got a scrimmage... today? And at Oi Racecourse too...
There's even a crowd!

text_block_list.name: People from Downtown
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, Inari!
Your trainer invited us, so here we are!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
Can't have a race without some noise. As for the race, think of it as an
ice-breaker. All these runners are gonna be your teammates after all.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
A little notice woulda been nice! But well, if that's whatcha want me
to do, I guess I've got no choice.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: Good, that's the spirit. Now... go get changed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems the race Inari One's trainer wanted me to come see is a
scrimmage between her and her new teammates.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Scanning my surroundings, it looks like he called together a number
of locals as well. Everyone from the soba shop owner to that feisty
alley cat is here...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And every one of them smiles warmly as Inari One leaves the gate.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(A scrimmage with all the other newbies, huh? I get where he's comin'
from, but he couldn't have told me sooner? This isn't somethin' you
should just spring on someone last minute. Urgh...)

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Ah, get your head outta the clouds! Pretty soon here she's gonna
lose steam, and then I'll—)

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text: Urrrauuugh!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (Huh?! She's... speeding up!)

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text:
I, uh... I ended up in fifth, so I guess my stamina still needs some
work...

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text: Huff! Huff! Wheeze! GRRRAAAUUUGH!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (Hey, hey! She's... she's like a totally different runner!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Oh no, you doooon't!

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text: Hnnngh! I'm not done... I'm not done yeeeet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A shock to us all, Inari One seems to be losing the battle of fighting
spirit! With only two hundred meters to go, at this rate, she's going to
lose!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As that fear flashes through my mind, my mouth opens on its own...
choice_data_list: Inari One! You can do iiiit!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: GRRRAUUUGH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her opponent is on her tail the whole way... but in the end, Inari One
wins by a nose.

text_block_list.name: Both
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text: AAAUGH! Darn it aaall! I lost agaaain!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... N-now wait a minute... When did you... get so strong?

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: That was a close one... But, well, I think ya get the idea, Inari.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
We don't need ya stickin' around outta obligation. Even without you,
my team'll get the crowd goin' just fine...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huh? Chief, what're ya talkin' about?! I'm s'posed to run on your team here in Oi Raceco—

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: For cryin' out loud, girl, didja think I wouldn't notice?! I can see that you don't wanna be here in your heart of hearts. I'm old, not blind.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
You want to go to Tracen, right? Hidin' your true desires doesn't suit
you, girl.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: If you're a true Edo girl, you'll take on the Twinkle Series, show 'em what the downtown's made of, and become a racing sensation there!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ch-Chief...

text_block_list.name: Soba Shop Owner
text_block_list.text:
He's right, you know! No matter where you're runnin', we'll be cheerin'
you on!

text_block_list.name: Local Shopkeeper
text_block_list.text:
Show 'em how we do things downtown! Turn that Twinkle stage
upside down!

text_block_list.name: People from Downtown
text_block_list.text:
YEEEAH!
INARI! INARI! INARI! INARI!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Guys...

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
...Tsk, wipe that gloomy look off your face. Go, you've got transfer
paperwork to fill out!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
You've already got a trainer ready to scout you... And I think we both
know they had something to do with your victory today.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Chief... Yeah. Yeah... you're right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several weeks later...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey, hey, guess who's ready to rumble!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
The downtown girl ready to throw down! Starting today, Edo girl Inari
is takin' on all of Tracen Academy! ...Wazzup?
choice_data_list: Inari One! I'm so glad you're finally here!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Just Inari's fine. Full names are for strangers, and no way I'd take on
the road ahead with someone I don't trust! Got that, Boss?
choice_data_list: Yeah! Let's show 'em what you're made of!
Yeah! Let's show 'em what you're made of!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Just Inari's fine. Full names're for strangers, and no way I'd take on the
road ahead with someone I don't trust! Got that, Boss?
choice_data_list: Yeah! Let's show 'em what you're made of!
Yeah! Let's show 'em what you're made of!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: You bet! This sparky Oi racer's gonna set fire to the Twinkle Series!
